title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
summary: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office only saw 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.

title: Indonesian Market Rout Deepens as Prabowo Policy Risks Mount
summary: Indonesian markets tumbled on Thursday, with the rupiah breaching the key 18,000-per-dollar level and stocks hitting a near six-year low, as mounting policy uncertainty and macro headwinds spooked investors.

title: Singapore's Ng on Balancing Security Amid Global Unrest
summary: Former Singapore Defense Minister Ng Eng Hen offers his perspective on the intersection of geopolitics and defense. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)
